creator: handy@lambic.space.lockheed.com
text:
XOsview is a graphical performance meter with stuff like system load,
   CPU, memory, SWAP, etc in nice bar graphs.  I've seen something like
   this on SGIs (GRview maybe?).  This is a beta version, some of the 
   meters don't yet exist.  Someone who understands how to get statistics
   out of the FreeBSD kernel could help round this out to be a really 
   cool little utility.  As it stands, it works just fine though.
   (Web page mentioned in the DESCR.)

Fix: #!/bin/sh
